max_sentences: 3
topic: how to window the metrics roll-up to recent rows
facts:
- metrics-summary.sh accepts --since YYYY-MM-DD and --days N
- the cutoff is resolved in jq via now and fromdateiso8601, so there is no cross-platform date math
- every section is filtered to rows at or after the cutoff
- the script is read-only with respect to the rest of the system
